title: Master of Balance
description:
About usFor more content updates and feedback, welcome to join the Discord group!

Об игреMaster of Balance is a narrative-driven workplace survival game.

You play as a junior manager at a game company who becomes caught up in a bizarre, otherworldly incident. To survive, you must carefully handle both daily life and work responsibilities while uncovering the truth behind what happened.

A rich variety of random daily events challenge you to maintain a delicate balance across five key stats: boss, subordinates, family, health, and wealth.

Every choice matters—one decision may instantly shift the entire situation.

A lighthearted yet unpredictable main story unfolds through multiple branching paths. Different choices lead to different outcomes—what truth will you uncover in the end?

Simple yet addictive mini-games, fully playable with a mouse.

A wide range of unique supernatural abilities that can be freely combined to create your own playstyle.
description_short: A sudden promotion. A mysterious power. Blessing or downfall? After an accident, your life collides with a childhood game world. With an odd boss, tricky coworkers, and relatives in the shadows, every choice tests your balance—your only way to seize back your fate.
